  "complexity_notes": "This is a single-line JSON file containing a complete OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for a Task Manager API. Despite being on one line, it defines a complex REST API with 6 main resource paths (/tasks, /tasks/{task_id}, /tasks/{task_id}/assign, /tasks/{task_id}/comments, /tasks/{task_id}/attachments, /tasks/search, /tasks/batch), 5 tags, comprehensive security schemes (bearerAuth, apiKey), detailed schemas (Task, User, Comment, Attachment, etc.), and standardized error responses. The specification supports advanced features like pagination, full-text search, batch operations, and file uploads."
